summary: Trip Pilot AI travel website with Google AdSense integration. User is adding a custom snippet to the site.
architectural_notes: Google AdSense script is embedded in the site

new_feature_requests.summary: Add the user-provided custom code snippet to the Trip Pilot AI website. Since the snippet content was not included in the message, prompt the user to paste or share the snippet so it can be correctly embedded in the appropriate location (e.g., index.html head/body, a specific page component, or AdBanner component).
